## Summary

## Required Evidence Checklist

- [ ] My branch is named after me.
- [ ] I read `README.md`, `plan.md`, every folder `todo.txt`, `prompt.md`, and the ADLC files.
- [ ] FastAPI backend runs locally.
- [ ] Frontend pages work and are presentable.
- [ ] Signup, login, authorization, and logout work.
- [ ] Image upload works and validates file type and size.
- [ ] Database has at least six tables.
- [ ] Table creation SQL is saved in `Database/`.
- [ ] Text2SQL correctness evidence is included.
- [ ] RAG answers are grounded in DRINKOO data.
- [ ] OpenRouter free model prompt is completed in `prompt.md`.
- [ ] Tests pass locally.
- [ ] Status page or health endpoint works.
- [ ] Security test report is included.
- [ ] Self-evaluation score and screenshots are included.
- [ ] ADLC/UAT evidence files are completed.
